---
title: "Spindle (Euonymus europaeus)"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

**Family:** [Celastraceae](/trees/family/celastraceae.html)

**Genus:** [*Euonymus*](/trees/genus/euonymus.html)

| Tree | Planted |
| --- | --- |
| [Tree 382 — Spindle](../382.html) |  |
